extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won a crash-marred sprint in Salerno after ZOCCARATO Samuele's solo breakaway was caught inside 3km, with EVENEPOEL Remco crashing twice including once from a stray dog collision.
tactical_patterns: PINOT Thibaut abandoned breakaway after collecting KOM points, using break solely for classification objectives not stage win.
CORT Magnus contested intermediate sprint from peloton to collect points, showing sprinters harvest bonifications even on break-dominated days.
ZOCCARATO Samuele attacked from break at final intermediate sprint with 25km remaining but only had 1-minute gap.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: won maiden Giro stage in chaotic finale, positioned well through final 3km crash zone
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: crashed twice including dog collision and again inside 3km, vulnerability in wet technical finishes evident
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: caught in 7km crash but recovered, team pacing adequate but positioning protection questionable
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: rear wheel slipped on white line in final 300m causing crash, wet line positioning error cost result
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: positive: second place and contested intermediate sprint for maglia ciclamino, consistent points harvesting strategy working
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: third despite chaos, wet handling superior to pure sprinters
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: tactical KOM point collection from early break then soft-pedaled back, classification farming executed perfectly
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: positive: retained maglia rosa navigating crashes at 7km, DSM protection adequate in chaotic conditions
